label: Ad Service
description: Serves contextual advertisements for the online boutique storefront. Maintains a hardcoded in-memory catalog of ads organized by product category. Returns relevant ads when context keys match categories, or falls back to serving random ads.
responsibilities: Serve contextual ads based on product category context keys
Fall back to random ad selection when no context keys are provided or no matches are found
Maintain an in-memory catalog of ads mapped to product categories
